item.title: Lab 1 - Server Setup
item.description: Created and deployed a Microsoft Azure Web Server.

item.title: Lab 2 - HTML Resume
item.description: Built a Portfolio Website using HTML and CSS.

item.title: Lab 3 - Personal Portfolio Website
item.description: Further enhanced the personal site, making it a tree linked to multiple pages.

item.title: Lab 4 - RSS and XML Syndication
item.description: Made a XML and RSS page to display Lab Projects.
